title: Decorative Entities
description: Decorative entities is a mod with a variety of entities to decorate your house.
body:
![Decorative Entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ff8415704c14d5d449f6c44d1c3c28128fd4a96.png)

Decorative entities is a mod with a variety of entities to decorate your house

new decorative entities were added 29/07/25

![Entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f71d14511868756adacc7c9effee923e058b4c8e.png)

![Entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40f68afa1a2d9bb73d1bd87d25bc0e363fd900aa.png)

To craft the entities you need to first craft the frame on the crafting table and then use the frame on the stone cutter to craft the entities. 

Frame crafting
Stripped Spruce Log and Glass

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55afd3fa7e4ac1d1ac79d879ed0f3df7558cd12c.png)

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f40b22ed0e3d9759d724faa53bbe847f88c435.jpeg)
